all.critique:
Overall, the analysis covers most of the important pipeline stages and shows a good modular structure. However, there are a few points where further clarification or additional details would improve the reliability and reproducibility of the code. Below are the main issues noted against the rubric:

1. Configuration Handling and Defaults
 • Although the analysis stresses error handling and fallback defaults for missing or malformed configuration keys, it does not spell out exactly how each modul
